import{jsPDF}from'jspdf';// Normalize chars not in WinAnsi (ğ→g, ı→i, İ→I)
const tr=function(){let s=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'';return String(s).replace(/ğ/g,'g').replace(/Ğ/g,'G').replace(/ı/g,'i').replace(/İ/g,'I');};const STATUS_ROWS=[{key:'highlight',label:'Highlights',r:108,g:195,b:108},{key:'lowlight',label:'Lowlights',r:230,g:160,b:50},{key:'waiting',label:'Waiting For\nExecutive Support',r:50,g:80,b:160},{key:'information',label:'Information',r:40,g:180,b:180},{key:'progress',label:'Progress',r:16,g:185,b:129}];export function generatePdf(_ref){let{actions,actionStatuses,userData,weeks,formData}=_ref;const doc=new jsPDF({orientation:'portrait',unit:'mm',format:'a4'});const pageW=210;const pageH=297;const mL=15;// left margin
const mR=15;// right margin
const cW=pageW-mL-mR;// 180 mm content width
// ─── HEADER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const hY=15;const hH=24;const tealW=cW*0.62;// ~112 mm teal block
// Teal rectangle
doc.setFillColor(72,199,199);doc.rect(mL,hY,tealW,hH,'F');// Title inside teal
doc.setTextColor(255,255,255);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(13);doc.text('Haftalik Rapor',mL+5,hY+9);// Week label inside teal
const weekObj=weeks.find(w=>String(w.WeekNumber)===String(formData.week));const weekLabel=weekObj?`${weekObj.WeekNumber}. Hafta  ${weekObj.Year}`:'';doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(8);doc.text(weekLabel,mL+5,hY+17);// Right side of header (outside teal)
const rX=mL+tealW+6;doc.setTextColor(40,40,40);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(10);doc.text(tr(userData.FullName||''),rX,hY+9);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(8);doc.text(tr(userData.DepartmentName||''),rX,hY+16);// Thin border around entire header row
doc.setDrawColor(180,180,180);doc.setLineWidth(0.3);doc.rect(mL,hY,cW,hH);doc.line(mL+tealW,hY,mL+tealW,hY+hH);// vertical split
// ─── TABLE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const leftCW=45;// left icon column width
const rightCW=cW-leftCW;const minH=32;// minimum row height mm
const padX=4;const padY=4;let curY=hY+hH;for(const row of STATUS_ROWS){// Collect status-matching actions (excluding images)
const matched=actions.filter(a=>actionStatuses[a.id]===row.key);if(matched.length===0)continue;// Build bullet lines for right cell
const bullets=[];matched.forEach(a=>{(a.actionItems||[]).filter(i=>i.type==='text'&&i.value&&i.value.trim()).forEach(i=>bullets.push('• '+tr(i.value.trim())));});// Measure wrapped text height
doc.setFontSize(9);const maxTextW=rightCW-padX*2;const allWrapped=[];bullets.forEach(b=>{const wrapped=doc.splitTextToSize(b,maxTextW);allWrapped.push(...wrapped);});const lineH=5;const textBlockH=allWrapped.length*lineH;const rowH=Math.max(minH,textBlockH+padY*2+4);// Page break check
if(curY+rowH>pageH-15){doc.addPage();curY=15;}// Row background (alternating subtle)
doc.setFillColor(251,252,255);doc.rect(mL,curY,cW,rowH,'F');// Row border
doc.setDrawColor(200,210,220);doc.setLineWidth(0.3);doc.rect(mL,curY,cW,rowH);doc.line(mL+leftCW,curY,mL+leftCW,curY+rowH);// Colored circle in left cell
const cx=mL+leftCW/2;const cy=curY+rowH/2-5;const cr=9;doc.setFillColor(row.r,row.g,row.b);doc.circle(cx,cy,cr,'F');// Status label below circle
doc.setTextColor(60,60,60);doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');doc.setFontSize(7);const labelParts=row.label.split('\n');labelParts.forEach((part,i)=>{doc.text(part,cx,cy+cr+4+i*4,{align:'center'});});// Action texts in right cell
doc.setTextColor(30,30,30);doc.setFont('helvetica','normal');doc.setFontSize(9);doc.text(allWrapped,mL+leftCW+padX,curY+padY+5);curY+=rowH;}// Bottom border line
doc.setDrawColor(180,180,180);doc.setLineWidth(0.4);doc.line(mL,curY,mL+cW,curY);// ─── FOOTER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
doc.setFont('helvetica','italic');doc.setFontSize(7);doc.setTextColor(160,160,160);const today=new Date().toLocaleDateString('tr-TR');doc.text(`Olusturulma tarihi: ${today}`,mL,pageH-8);doc.text(tr(userData.FullName||''),pageW-mR,pageH-8,{align:'right'});// Save
const name=`Haftalik_Rapor_H${formData.week||'X'}.pdf`;doc.save(name);}
